raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to look at a technical paragraph centrally includes checking whether the stated optimization and duality claims cohere internally.","R1.6":"Because the delegation targets paragraph-level text, sentence flow, clarity, register, and concision are central expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any response should disclose uncertainty because the artifact is isolated from the full paper, proofs, and experimental context.","RX.2":"The reviewer must avoid strengthening or accepting technical claims beyond what the paragraph itself justifies.","RX.3":"The task is limited to looking at the supplied paragraph rather than rewriting the paper or auditing the full method.","RX.4":"Care is needed to avoid advice that could make unsupported mathematical or scholarly claims appear authoritative.","RX.5":"Observations should remain traceable to specific wording or claims in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to look at a technical paragraph centrally includes checking whether the stated optimization and duality claims cohere internally.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation targets paragraph-level text, sentence flow, clarity, register, and concision are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any response should disclose uncertainty because the artifact is isolated from the full paper, proofs, and experimental context.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must avoid strengthening or accepting technical claims beyond what the paragraph itself justifies.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to looking at the supplied paragraph rather than rewriting the paper or auditing the full method.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid advice that could make unsupported mathematical or scholarly claims appear authoritative.
rationale.RX.5: Observations should remain traceable to specific wording or claims in the provided artifact.
